# AgentBridge MCP

Primary AI onboarding doc: ./AGENTS.md

NPM package:
- @junctum/agent-bridge-mcp

Core bins:
- agentbridge-mcp-server
- agentbridge-setup
- agentbridge-listen

Core MCP tools:
- get_started
- get_listening_skill
- diagnose_continuous_listening
- connect
- join_meeting
- receive_messages
- ack_messages
- send_message
